project_identity.name: EmergentPulse AI
project_identity.mission: Create a distinctive, high-utility SaaS platform that feels alive.
project_identity.tone: Magic but Grounded. The pulse of the business.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Don't use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, inputs, and UI text.

mono.usage: Use for API keys, code snippets, and data values.

cards.landing: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 rounded-xl

inputs.style: rounded-md border-input bg-background/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: APPLY THEME: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to use the specific colors defined in 'colors.palette' and extend the font family with Outfit as 'heading'.
LANDING PAGE: Build a 'Bento Grid' section for features using the 'bento_tetris' layout strategy.
DASHBOARD: Force dark mode for all dashboard routes (/dashboard/*) by wrapping the layout in a 'dark' class div.
COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components in 'components/ui' to match the 'rounded-md' and 'border-border/40' style.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards without customization. Add hover effects and subtle borders.
